caption:
An electrician we work with gets nearly every job through Instagram DMs. Great problem — until it wasn't.

Half were tyre-kickers, and the real ones went cold before he could reply. So we put a speed-to-lead system on his Instagram: every DM gets an instant reply, qualifies the job, and weeds out the time-wasters.

The serious leads get booked automatically — and he spends his evenings on the tools, not in his inbox.

Drowning in DMs and missing the good ones? Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#electrician #sparky #tradesbusiness #leadgen #ukandireland
